data.title: Elon Musk Predicts Tesla's FSD Will Surpass Human Driving Safety By Q2 2025
data.description: Elon Musk said that the company sees its FSD driver assistance technology superseding human driving capabilities in 3 months.

data.title: Los Angeles Wildfires Stoke Investor Fears: Edison International's Stock Ended 10% Lower On Wednesday Amid Concerns Over Possible Equipment Links To Forest Fires
data.description: The potential involvement of the company's equipment in these fires has heightened investor anxiety.

data.title: KKR Extends Tender Offer For FUJI SOFT Amid Bain Capital's Hostile Partial Bid
data.description: KKR has extended its tender offer for FUJI SOFT to January 24, 2025, amid Bain Capital's hostile bid, reaffirming its commitment to privatizing the company.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum ETFs See $742 Million In Outflows, Supply Shock Unlikely In 2025, Report Shows
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) spot ETFs faced substantial net outflows of $742 million on Jan.8.

data.title: Chile Rejects Dominga Project Once Again, Taps Debt Market To Help Its Copper Growth
data.description: Chile rejects $2.5B iron and copper mining project near Humboldt Penguin Reserve due to environmental concerns, despite potential economic benefits.
